Syntax Surgeon

Operate on flawed sentences under pressure. Improve flow, fix errors, and save the paragraph!

Ward: Novice
Time: 60
Repairs: 0
Vitals: Stable

Select Ward

Operation Tools

Click Start Operation to begin. The patient's flawed sentence will appear on the monitor. Select the most accurate revision from the tools available. Correct repairs grant time, whilst mistakes will penalize the clock!

Waiting for patient... Press Start Operation.

Operation Concluded!
